issues.title: Potential Race Condition in Ingestion Command
issues.details: The ingestion command does not handle concurrent executions properly, which may lead to race conditions when multiple ingestion jobs are run simultaneously. Suggested fix: Implement locking mechanisms or use a job queue to manage concurrent executions. File: .claude/commands/ingest.md:3-5.

issues.title: Missing Input Validation in Promote Command
issues.details: The promote command lacks validation for the `--build` input, which could lead to attempts to promote non-existent builds. Suggested fix: Add checks to ensure the specified build exists before proceeding. File: .claude/commands/prompt.md:2-3.

issues.title: Inconsistent Error Handling in Ingestion Command
issues.details: The ingestion command emits actionable messages on errors but does not stop processing other inputs, which may lead to incomplete or corrupted data. Suggested fix: Ensure that critical errors halt the process. File: .claude/commands/ingest.md:4.

issues.title: Lack of Unit Tests for New Logic
issues.details: The commands lack unit tests for new logic introduced in the ingestion and promote commands. Suggested fix: Implement unit tests to cover edge cases and ensure functionality. File: .claude/commands/ingest.md, .claude/commands/prompt.md.

issues.title: Inadequate Documentation for Commands
issues.details: Some commands lack detailed documentation on expected inputs and outputs, which may lead to misuse. Suggested fix: Enhance documentation to include examples and detailed descriptions. Files: .claude/commands/*.md.

summary: The overall code quality shows several areas for improvement, particularly in handling concurrency, input validation, error management, and testing. Documentation also needs enhancement to align with project standards.
